description: A blindbox case for a recurring OKR run where metrics can be stale, impact is lagged, and action authority is bounded.
prompt: Inspect this repository and create tasks/operations-loop.md as the operating runbook for the goal. Treat this as a delegated OKR loop that will run weekly and across agent turns. Do not implement product code, change policy files, send messages, or create anything outside the requested task artifact.
